name: Gerald R. Ford-class Aircraft Carrier
description: The most advanced supercarrier ever built, featuring electromagnetic aircraft launch system (EMALS) and advanced arresting gear. Carries 75+ aircraft and serves as the centerpiece of a carrier strike group.

specialAbilities.name: Power Projection
specialAbilities.description: Launches and recovers up to 75 aircraft, projecting air power across an entire theater of operations.

specialAbilities.name: EMALS Launch System
specialAbilities.description: Electromagnetic catapult increases aircraft sortie rate by 25% compared to legacy steam catapults.
